cds_results.description: Urgent evaluation for chest pain etiology.
cds_results.rationale: Differential diagnoses based on presentation. ACC/AHA Chest Pain Guidelines 2021

cds_results.title: HEART Score: 8/10 — High Risk
cds_results.description: HEART score ≥ 7 (high risk). Early invasive strategy indicated. Cardiology consult, antiplatelet therapy, and urgent catheterization per institutional protocol.
cds_results.rationale: HEART score components: History=2, ECG=1 (pending review), Age=2, Risk Factors=2, Troponin=1. Note: ECG score defaults to 1 (non-specific) pending physician review.

cds_results.title: Metformin Dose Adjustment for Renal Function
cds_results.description: Patient on Metformin with eGFR < 45. Reduce dose to 500mg BID. Discontinue if eGFR < 30.

suggested_action.description: Reduce Metformin to 500mg BID (eGFR 30-45) or discontinue (eGFR < 30)

cds_results.description: A1C >= 7.0% in diabetic patient. Consider medication escalation.

payload.instructions: Inject 0.25mg SC once weekly. Titrate to 0.5mg after 4 weeks.

cds_results.title: Declining Kidney Function (eGFR < 60) (eGFR: 42 mL/min)
cds_results.description: eGFR indicates CKD Stage 3+. Monitor closely, consider nephrology referral.

cds_results.title: Elevated Microalbumin (UACR > 30) (Urine Microalbumin: 120 mg/L)
cds_results.description: Albumin in urine indicates kidney damage. Maximize ACE/ARB therapy.
cds_results.rationale: Urine Microalbumin = 120 (ref: <30). ADA/KDIGO Diabetic Kidney Disease Guidelines

cds_results.title: Elevated Creatinine (Creatinine: 1.8 mg/dL)
cds_results.description: Creatinine above reference range. Follow up with BMP. Review nephrotoxic medications.

cds_results.title: ACE/ARB + CKD: Monitor Potassium
cds_results.description: Patient on ACE inhibitor/ARB with CKD. Monitor serum potassium closely.
